name: fabi-swarm
description: Fabi Swarm — provider d'inférence LLM P2P (Parallax) branché dans Theia AI
author: Noa Giannone

scripts.prepare: yarn run clean && yarn run build
scripts.test: tsc --skipLibCheck --strictNullChecks --noImplicitAny --types node --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target ES2017 --outDir lib --rootDir src src/common/fabi-chat-input-visibility.ts src/common/fabi-code-mode.ts src/node/fabi-runtime-install.ts src/node/fabi-runtime-manager.ts src/node/fabi-worker-tuning.ts src/node/fabi-connection.ts src/node/fabi-code-config.ts src/node/fabi-code-part-stream.ts src/node/fabi-code-server.ts && node --test test/*.test.js
